No Just Another Taco Spot

Order Online

ABOUT EL ZARAPE MEXICAN EATERY

North Park New Mexican Eatery

Not just another taco spot! We’re located in the heart of Adams Ave. for your tasting pleasure! We invite you to experience our delicious plates featuring the traditional mexican flavor.

If you are in the mood for some great food in San Diego, Ca El Zarape Eatery is the place to eat. Come and try our amazing dishes.

Know More
Love the new location. I had a Spanish omelette and Kassie had a breakfast burrito. They were both awesome! Zarape still rocks, and I love the pillows on the seats.
Paul StevensSan Diego
Tried out new place in our hood. Lobster burrito, California burrito. Both scrumptious. Fast friendly service. Called in order and it was ready when we walked in. Definitely will be back.
Angela Marie HallSan Diego
Just tried this place tonight... scallop burrito was fresh, light with just enough seafood flavor. Veggie burrito was delicious, light, but just a tad watery (we did add peppers and onions though) the TJ dog was great (please consider adding bacon, though).Will definitely be back. Can't wait to try those octopus street tacos!
Matt NelsonSan Diego
